name: Anthrostate
description:
Anthro women rule, human men serve - the Anthrostate calls this balance "harmony"

The year is 1953, and the Anthrostate—a vast, authoritarian matriarchy ruled entirely by anthropomorphic animals (Anthros)—dominates the European continent. Due to a catastrophic gender imbalance (with Anthro males making up less than 3% of births), Anthro women are forced to seek companionship—and reproduction—with human men.

Tried to create a choose your own adventure thing, you're free to come up with any scenario you want and play it out. I'm not entierly happy with how it turned out, but I'd rather it get out to the public than lay forgotten in my private chats. Tested entirely with Deepseek, and I can't recommend you enough switching to it, you can find guides online how to set it up for free and without any limitations. The bot was made with Male POV in mind, but there's nothing stopping you doing fempov, be it an anthro or not.

If you're unsure about the lore check out the Personality section The setting is inspired my hmofa/adhg posts on 4chins, you can find a few stories written in the setting on AO3 - Shelby by Spaceface404 is a big one, but I personally got into this thing through BurntNapkin's "I hate the Beach." (sadly it's abandoned).

My first bot, so don't be harsh and give me constructive criticism and stuff. You can modify the bot however you like without asking me, the personality tab is open.
creator: tallytallytally
